supersedes_status: INVALID — the prior 'canonical' values are the output of build_xlxs.py, not a triangulation; the freshly-uploaded CSVs are the output of build_longitudinal_panel.py which has independent bugs. Neither script is presently a clean source. See audit_report.md.
decision_pending: audit_decisions_for_AC.md — AC must adjudicate (a) pipeline authority, (b) reporting-n framing, (c) Wake County narrative, (d) Stratum B trajectory framing before any manuscript patching resumes.

stability_assessment.determinism: PASS — two consecutive runs of build_longitudinal_panel.py produce byte-identical outputs across all 4 CSVs.
stability_assessment.transparency: PARTIAL FAIL — Fig_4 legend strings are stale literals divorced from the CSV; build_figure.py has /mnt/project and /home/claude hard-coded paths.
stability_assessment.honest_counts: FAIL — n_counties_reporting in build_longitudinal_panel.py reflects rows that survive a buggy filter (including AIDSVu -1 suppression codes treated as integers); the values 51/213/2958 are not 'reporting' counts.
stability_assessment.anchored_constants: PARTIAL FAIL — ALPHA=1.2 and SELECTION_AMP=1.5 in build_figure.py have informal in-comment anchors but no resolvable citation keys. Retention function constants match §4.1 spec. No per-city conditional branches found.

data_authority.pipelines_disagree_because: materially different aggregation methods (see method_documentation below), NOT rounding.

build_longitudinal_panel_py.suppression_handling: BROKEN — pd.to_numeric(errors='coerce') leaves integer -1/-2/-9 unchanged. dropna only catches genuine NaN. -1 rows are summed into total_dx and total_idu.
build_longitudinal_panel_py.stratum_a_definition: Per-year match of MSA_COUNTY_MAP (state, bare_name) against AIDSVu (state, county) after stripping ' County' and ' Parish' only. NOT robust to ' city', ' Municipio', or embedded newlines.
stratum_a_missing_constituents: Virginia: Norfolk, Virginia Beach, Chesapeake (AIDSVu uses ' city' suffix)
Louisiana: East Baton Rouge (AIDSVu uses 'East Baton Rouge\nParish' with embedded newline)
Puerto Rico: San Juan (AIDSVu uses ' Municipio' suffix; San Juan reported n_new_dx=91 in 2023)
Connecticut: all three Planning Regions for Bridgeport, Hartford, NewHaven (AIDSVu uses embedded newlines in names)
build_longitudinal_panel_py.n_counties_reporting_semantics: rows with non-NaN n_new_dx after buggy coerce — INCLUDES rows where n_new_dx == -1 (suppressed). Not 'counties reporting'.
build_longitudinal_panel_py.wake_county_partition: Stratum A (msa_keys precedence in lines 309-314); overlay file flags in_msa=True, msa_name=Raleigh

build_xlxs_py.idu_computation: Sums integer 'New Diagnoses IDU Cases' column directly via .sum(skipna=True) (lines 184, 230)
build_xlxs_py.suppression_handling: CORRECT — SUPPRESSION_CODES = [-1, -2, -9] are converted to NaN on any column containing 'Cases'/'Rate'/'Percent' before arithmetic (lines 39, 117).
build_xlxs_py.stratum_a_definition: FIPS-set frozen from 2023 matches (lines 277-286). Keys include literal ' County'/' Parish'/' city'/' Municipio' suffixes; handles 2022+ CT Planning Region transition with both historical-County AND Planning-Region entries per CT MSA.
build_xlxs_py.n_counties_reporting_semantics: sub['n_new_dx'].notna().sum() AFTER suppression cleaning — actual reporting count.

duplicate_by_fips.note: exact (state,name) duplicate — collapses to 1 in name-keyed set
FIPS misalignment — Hancock TN actual FIPS is 47067; matching is by name, so both counted correctly
FIPS misalignment — Macon TN actual FIPS is 47111; matching by name, both counted

duplicate_by_state_county_name_NOT_in_AC.name: Schuylkill
duplicate_by_state_county_name_NOT_in_AC.note: Schuylkill PA actual FIPS is 42107; 42135 is Wyoming Co PA

duplicate_by_state_county_name_NOT_in_AC.name: Boone
duplicate_by_state_county_name_NOT_in_AC.note: Boone WV actual FIPS is 54005; 54009 is incorrect

cdc_220_duplicate_fips_findings.script_behavior: build_longitudinal_panel.py keys on (state, county_name) via Python set, which collapses all dup-by-name pairs to single entries. No double-counting in Stratum B sums. The misaligned FIPS columns only affect the FIPS field of cdc_220_counties_with_msa_flag.csv (incorrect FIPS for 4 rows), not the stratum aggregates.

stratum_endpoints_canonical_csv.WARNING: Values below are contaminated by AIDSVu suppression-code (-1, -2, -9) being treated as numeric data. Do not cite these as clean diagnosis counts without acknowledging the limitation.

A_msa.n_counties_reporting_semantics: name-matched MSA constituents (8 of 59 missing due to naming bugs); NOT year-varying reporting count

B_vuln_rural.n_counties_reporting_semantics: rows surviving buggy coerce of cdc_220 outside-MSA entries; not literal reporting
B_vuln_rural.manuscript_framing_status: the prior handoff's 'flat 46→46 across decade' is misleading — endpoints are coincidentally close but the trajectory peaks at the EHE-launch year (2019), drops sharply in 2020 (COVID + EHE-launch year), and oscillates

C_other.n_counties_reporting_semantics: rows surviving buggy coerce; not literal reporting (-1 rows kept)

stratum_endpoints_build_xlxs_alternative.method: integer 'New Diagnoses IDU Cases' sum AFTER suppression-to-NaN cleaning; FIPS-based stratum assignment; correct MSA name handling

build_figure_py_constants.per_city_conditional_branches: NONE FOUND — no `if city == X: retention = Y` patterns
build_figure_py_constants.inline_citation_status: ALPHA and SELECTION_AMP have informal in-comment anchors only (no bibliographic key); retention comments reference 'PURPOSE 1/2 aggregate' and 'real-world LAI in marginalized cohorts' without specific citation
build_figure_py_constants.executability_locally: WILL NOT RUN — line 6 reads /mnt/project/city_pep_efficacy_results.csv (Anthropic compute path); lines 38, 111, 112 write to /home/claude/letter/ (Anthropic compute path). Local candidate input is city_gamma_table.csv (column-compatible).

fig_4_legend_labels_stale.diagnosis: Stale literals carried over from a prior session; not derived from any current pipeline output.

epidemiological_consequences_of_bugs: Hampton Roads MSA is empty in Stratum A — all 3 Virginia independent cities (Norfolk, Virginia Beach, Chesapeake) dropped by ' city' suffix non-handling
All three Connecticut MSAs (Bridgeport, Hartford, NewHaven) are empty in Stratum A — Planning Region names contain embedded newlines that defeat string equality
Baton Rouge MSA is empty in Stratum A — embedded newline in 'East Baton Rouge\nParish'
San Juan PR is empty in Stratum A despite reporting n_new_dx=91 in 2023 — ' Municipio' suffix not stripped
All county rows where n_new_dx == -1 (1,170 rows in 2023 alone) contribute -1 to total_dx in whatever stratum they land
All county rows where idu_pct == -1 with positive n_new_dx contribute negative IDU diagnoses proportional to n_new_dx
